text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
My instructor had to cancel our five o'clock
French lesson tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Six thirty is my tea ceremony lesson, followed by
a social gathering from eight o'clock...

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Many well-known individuals from the financial
world will be present... So I should use my spare
time until the tea lesson to brush up on the
economy.

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
I must present myself well so as not to embarrass
my family.
